---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Tingting"
date: "2026-03-13"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggforce)
library(pheatmap)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(vegan)
library(broom)
library(ggstance)
library(lubridate)
library(readxl)
library(ggpubr)
library(janitor)
library(rio)
library(tidyr)
library(caret)
library(mlbench)
library(doMC)
library(caret)
library(pROC)
library(mixOmics)
library(tidyverse)
library(mixOmicsCaret)  
library(mlbench)
library(ggplot2)
library(forcats)
library(dplyr)
library(openxlsx)
library(readxl)
library(data.table)
```


```{r}
all_annotation<-read.xlsx("~/diagnoser_paper.Rdata")

# Add "X" to the start of each cell in the specific column
all_annotation$CHEM_ID <- paste("X", all_annotation$CHEM_ID, sep = "")

longti_data<-read.xlsx("~/all_anchor_norm_impute30_log_output_halfmin.xlsx")

names(longti_data)[4:791] <- paste("X", names(longti_data)[4:791], sep = "")
longti_data<-na.omit(longti_data)
longti_data_1<-longti_data%>%filter(TP%in% c("Mor_w24","Mor_w1","6mth", "18mth", "6yr","10yr"))

load("~/psychopathology_wide.Rdata")
psychopathology_wide_s<-data.frame(psychopathology_wide)[,c(1:7,9,13:17,50,51,56)]
fish_oil<- read_xlsx('~/ABC_Fishoil.xlsx', sheet = 'Data') 
VD<-read.csv('~/D-vitamin.csv') 
w24_all<-longti_data_2%>%filter(TP=="Mor_w24")

```

## R Markdown
```{r}
load("~/covariat_all_18.Rdata")
load("~/proteomics_data_s.Rdata")

```

```{r}
#proteome <-proteomics_data_s

load("~/diag_all_name.Rdata")
hold<-list(diag_all_name[,c(1:2)],covariat_all_18,proteomics_data_s[,c("ABCNO","FGF-23","VEGFA","IL6","MCP-1","IL-12B","CD5","CCL3")],w24_al,fish_oil[,c(1,2)])%>%reduce(full_join, by="ABCNO")

hold <- hold %>%
  mutate(fish_oil_binary = case_when(
    fish_oil == "Fiskeolie" ~ 1,
    fish_oil == "Placebo" ~ 0,
    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  ))  
```

###logistic regression
hcmpf
```{r}

# Temporarily update names to valid names for processing
Result_table <- matrix(data = NA, nrow = 8, ncol = 6)
colnames(Result_table) <- c("name","OR","CIL","CIH","p.value","N")
Result_table <- as.data.frame(Result_table)

j <- 1

for (i in 19:26) {

  y.var <- "hcmpf"
  x.var <- names(hold)[i]

  my.lm.formula <- as.formula(paste0(y.var, " ~ ", x.var))

  lm_model <- lm(my.lm.formula, data = hold)

  tt <- tidy(lm_model)

  # N used in model (after NA removal)
  N_used <- nrow(model.frame(lm_model))

  Result_table[j,1] <- x.var
  Result_table[j,2] <- round(coef(lm_model)[2], 4)
  Result_table[j,3] <- round(confint(lm_model)[2,1], 4)
  Result_table[j,4] <- round(confint(lm_model)[2,2], 4)
  Result_table[j,5] <- round(tt$p.value[2], 10)
  Result_table[j,6] <- N_used

  j <- j + 1
}


Result_table<-Result_table%>%
  mutate(FDR= p.adjust(Result_table$p.value,method="fdr"))
Result_table_Significant <- subset(Result_table,p.value<= 0.05)
HCMPF<-Result_table
Result_table
feature_order <- c("CRP", "FGF-23", "VEGFA", "IL6", "MCP-1", "IL-12B", "CD5", "CCL3")

plot_HCMPF <- Result_table %>%
  mutate(
    name = factor(name, levels = rev(feature_order)),  # controls y-axis order

    sig_group = case_when(
      FDR < 0.05 ~ "FDR < 0.05",
      p.value < 0.05 ~ "P.value < 0.05",
      TRUE ~ "ns"
    ) %>% factor(levels = c("FDR < 0.05", "P.value < 0.05", "ns")),

   p_fmt = case_when(
  FDR < 0.001 ~ formatC(FDR, format = "e", digits = 2),
  FDR < 0.05  ~ format(round(FDR, 3), nsmall = 3),
  TRUE        ~ format(round(FDR, 2), nsmall = 2)
),

    label = case_when(
      FDR < 0.05 ~ paste0("** ", p_fmt),
      p.value < 0.05 ~ paste0("* ", p_fmt),
      TRUE ~ ""
    )
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(
    x = OR,
    y = name,
    color = sig_group
  )) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = CIL, xmax = CIH), width = 0.2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "longdash", color = "grey") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("FDR < 0.05" = "red", "P.value < 0.05" = "black", "ns" = "grey"),
    name = "Significance"
  ) +
  labs(
    y = NULL,
    x = "Estimate",
    title = "Hydroxy CMPF-week 24"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = label, x = CIH + 0.005),
    hjust = 0,
    size = 3.5,
    color = "darkgrey"
  )

plot_HCMPF


```

CMPF
```{r}

# Temporarily update names to valid names for processing
Result_table <- matrix(data = NA, nrow = 8, ncol = 6)
colnames(Result_table) <- c("name","OR","CIL","CIH","p.value","N")
Result_table <- as.data.frame(Result_table)

j <- 1

for (i in 19:26) {

  y.var <- "CMPF"
  x.var <- names(hold)[i]

  my.lm.formula <- as.formula(paste0(y.var, " ~ ", x.var))

  lm_model <- lm(my.lm.formula, data = hold)

  tt <- tidy(lm_model)

  # N used in model (after NA removal)
  N_used <- nrow(model.frame(lm_model))

  Result_table[j,1] <- x.var
  Result_table[j,2] <- round(coef(lm_model)[2], 4)
  Result_table[j,3] <- round(confint(lm_model)[2,1], 4)
  Result_table[j,4] <- round(confint(lm_model)[2,2], 4)
  Result_table[j,5] <- round(tt$p.value[2], 10)
  Result_table[j,6] <- N_used

  j <- j + 1
}


Result_table<-Result_table%>%
  mutate(FDR= p.adjust(Result_table$p.value,method="fdr"))
Result_table_Significant <- subset(Result_table,p.value<= 0.05)
CMPF<-Result_table
feature_order <- c("CRP", "FGF-23", "VEGFA", "IL6", "MCP-1", "IL-12B", "CD5", "CCL3")

plot_CMPF <- Result_table %>%
  mutate(
    name = factor(name, levels = rev(feature_order)),  # controls y-axis order

    sig_group = case_when(
      FDR < 0.05 ~ "FDR < 0.05",
      p.value < 0.05 ~ "P.value < 0.05",
      TRUE ~ "ns"
    ) %>% factor(levels = c("FDR < 0.05", "P.value < 0.05", "ns")),

   p_fmt = case_when(
  FDR < 0.001 ~ formatC(FDR, format = "e", digits = 2),
  FDR < 0.05  ~ format(round(FDR, 3), nsmall = 3),
  TRUE        ~ format(round(FDR, 2), nsmall = 2)
),

    label = case_when(
      FDR < 0.05 ~ paste0("** ", p_fmt),
      p.value < 0.05 ~ paste0("* ", p_fmt),
      TRUE ~ ""
    )
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(
    x = OR,
    y = name,
    color = sig_group
  )) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = CIL, xmax = CIH), width = 0.2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "longdash", color = "grey") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("FDR < 0.05" = "red", "P.value < 0.05" = "black", "ns" = "grey"),
    name = "Significance"
  ) +
  labs(
    y = NULL,
    x = "Estimate",
    title = "CMPF-week 24"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = label, x = CIH + 0.005),
    hjust = 0,
    size = 3.5,
    color = "darkgrey"
  )

plot_CMPF
```

3cmpfp
```{r}
Result_table <- matrix(data = NA, nrow =8, ncol = 6)
colnames(Result_table) <- c("name","OR","CIL","CIH","p.value","N")
Result_table <- as.data.frame(Result_table)

j <- 1

for (i in 19:26) {

  y.var <- "3cmpfp"
  x.var <- names(hold)[i]

  my.lm.formula <- as.formula(paste0(y.var, " ~ ", x.var))

  lm_model <- lm(my.lm.formula, data = hold)

  tt <- tidy(lm_model)

  # N used in model (after NA removal)
  N_used <- nrow(model.frame(lm_model))

  Result_table[j,1] <- x.var
  Result_table[j,2] <- round(coef(lm_model)[2], 4)
  Result_table[j,3] <- round(confint(lm_model)[2,1], 4)
  Result_table[j,4] <- round(confint(lm_model)[2,2], 4)
  Result_table[j,5] <- round(tt$p.value[2], 10)
  Result_table[j,6] <- N_used

  j <- j + 1
}


Result_table<-Result_table%>%
  mutate(FDR= p.adjust(Result_table$p.value,method="fdr"))
Result_table_Significant <- subset(Result_table,p.value<= 0.05)
CMPF3<-Result_table
feature_order <- c("CRP", "FGF-23", "VEGFA", "IL6", "MCP-1", "IL-12B", "CD5", "CCL3")

plot_3CMPF <- Result_table %>%
  mutate(
    name = factor(name, levels = rev(feature_order)),  # controls y-axis order

    sig_group = case_when(
      FDR < 0.05 ~ "FDR < 0.05",
      p.value < 0.05 ~ "P.value < 0.05",
      TRUE ~ "ns"
    ) %>% factor(levels = c("FDR < 0.05", "P.value < 0.05", "ns")),

   p_fmt = case_when(
  FDR < 0.001 ~ formatC(FDR, format = "e", digits = 2),
  FDR < 0.05  ~ format(round(FDR, 3), nsmall = 3),
  TRUE        ~ format(round(FDR, 2), nsmall = 2)
),

    label = case_when(
      FDR < 0.05 ~ paste0("** ", p_fmt),
      p.value < 0.05 ~ paste0("* ", p_fmt),
      TRUE ~ ""
    )
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(
    x = OR,
    y = name,
    color = sig_group
  )) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = CIL, xmax = CIH), width = 0.2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "longdash", color = "grey") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("FDR < 0.05" = "red", "P.value < 0.05" = "black", "ns" = "grey"),
    name = "Significance"
  ) +
  labs(
    y = NULL,
    x = "Estimate",
    title = "3-CMPFP-week 24"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = label, x = CIH + 0.005),
    hjust = 0,
    size = 3.5,
    color = "darkgrey"
  )

plot_3CMPF
```

```{r}
combined_plot <- ggarrange(
  plot_CMPF, plot_HCMPF, plot_3CMPF,
  ncol = 3, nrow = 1,
  align = "hv",
  common.legend = T,
  legend = "right",
  labels = c("a", "b", "c"),
  label.x = -0.005,
  label.y = 1.01,   # move labels upward
  font.label = list(size = 14, face = "bold")
)

combined_plot

library(patchwork)
(plot_HCMPF|plot_CMPF|plot_3CMPF)
```


CRP
```{r}
hold_1 <- hold[, c(1:5, 19:26, which(names(hold) %in% c("cmpf","hcmpf","3cmpfp")))]
PM<-hold_1
PM<-na.omit(PM)
#######################################################3
model.M <- lm(CRP ~ hcmpf, na.action = na.omit,PM)
summary(model.M)

model.Y <- glm(adhd~hcmpf + CRP, family=binomial, na.action = na.omit,PM)
summary(model.Y)

set.seed(234)
results <- mediation::mediate(
  model.m = model.M,
  model.y = model.Y,
  treat = "hcmpf",
  mediator = "CRP",
  boot = TRUE,
  sims = 1000
)
summary(results)
plot(results)
prop_mediated <- results$n.avg * 100  # Convert to percentage
mediation_p_value <- results$n.avg.p
ACME_P_value <- results$d.avg.p  # Assuming ACME P-value is the same as d.avg.p

# Plot results
plot(results, main = "Treat: Hydroxy CMPF; Mediator: CRP", 
     xlab = "Effect Sizes", ylab = "Mediation Pathways", 
     col = "darkblue", pch = 19, cex = 1.2)
grid(col = "gray")

# Dynamically adjust text position for the top-right corner
x_range <- par("usr")[1:2] # Get x-axis range
y_range <- par("usr")[3:4] # Get y-axis range

text_x <- max(x_range) - 0.18 * diff(x_range)  # Increase horizontal offset to move left
text_y_top <- max(y_range) - 0.05 * diff(y_range)  # Slightly below the top edge
text_y_middle <- max(y_range) - 0.1 * diff(y_range)  # Below the first text
text_y_bottom <- max(y_range) - 0.15 * diff(y_range)  # Below the second text

# Add annotations in the top-right corner
text(x = text_x, y = text_y_top, 
     labels = paste("Prop. Mediated (avg):", round(prop_mediated, 2), "%"), 
     col = "black", cex = 1.2)

text(x = text_x, y = text_y_middle, 
     labels = paste("Prop. Mediated P-value:", signif(mediation_p_value, 3)), 
     col = "black", cex = 1.2)

text(x = text_x, y = text_y_bottom, 
     labels = paste("ACME P-value:", signif(ACME_P_value, 3)), 
     col = "black", cex = 1.2)
```
another style
```{r}
plot_df <- data.frame(
  Effect = factor(c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect"),
                  levels = c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect")),
  Estimate = c(results$d.avg, results$z.avg, results$tau.coef),
  Lower = c(results$d.avg.ci[1], results$z.avg.ci[1], results$tau.ci[1]),
  Upper = c(results$d.avg.ci[2], results$z.avg.ci[2], results$tau.ci[2]),
  P_value = c(results$d.avg.p, results$z.avg.p, results$tau.p)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = ifelse(P_value < 0.001, "P < 0.001",
                     paste0("P = ", format(round(P_value, 3), nsmall = 3)))
  )

prop_label <- paste0(
  "Prop. Mediated (avg) = ",
  round(results$n.avg * 100, 2), "%  ",
  "(",
  round(results$n.avg.ci[1] * 100, 2), "%, ",
  round(results$n.avg.ci[2] * 100, 2), "%)",
  "; P = ",
  ifelse(results$n.avg.p < 0.001, "< 0.001",
         format(round(results$n.avg.p, 3), nsmall = 3))
)

# Data for main effects
plot_df <- data.frame(
  Effect = factor(c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect"),
                  levels = c("Total Effect", "ADE", "ACME")),
  Estimate = c(results$tau.coef, results$z.avg, results$d.avg),
  Lower = c(results$tau.ci[1], results$z.avg.ci[1], results$d.avg.ci[1]),
  Upper = c(results$tau.ci[2], results$z.avg.ci[2], results$d.avg.ci[2]),
  P_value = c(results$tau.p, results$z.avg.p, results$d.avg.p)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = case_when(
      P_value < 0.001 ~ "P < 0.001",
      TRUE ~ paste0("P = ", format(round(P_value, 3), nsmall = 3))
    )
  )

# Text for mediation proportion
prop_text <- paste0(
  "Prop. Mediated = ", format(round(results$n.avg * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  "95% CI: ", format(round(results$n.avg.ci[1] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "% to ",
  format(round(results$n.avg.ci[2] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  ifelse(results$n.avg.p < 0.001, "P < 0.001",
         paste0("P = ", format(round(results$n.avg.p, 3), nsmall = 3)))
)

# Expand x-range a bit so labels fit nicely
x_min <- min(plot_df$Lower, na.rm = TRUE)
x_max <- max(plot_df$Upper, na.rm = TRUE)
x_pad <- 0.35 * (x_max - x_min)

# Prepare data
plot_df <- data.frame(
  Effect = factor(c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect"),
                  levels = c("Total Effect", "ADE", "ACME")),
  Estimate = c(results$tau.coef, results$z.avg, results$d.avg),
  Lower = c(results$tau.ci[1], results$z.avg.ci[1], results$d.avg.ci[1]),
  Upper = c(results$tau.ci[2], results$z.avg.ci[2], results$d.avg.ci[2]),
  P_value = c(results$tau.p, results$z.avg.p, results$d.avg.p)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = case_when(
      P_value < 0.001 ~ "P < 0.001",
      TRUE ~ paste0("P = ", format(round(P_value, 3), nsmall = 3))
    )
  )

# Proportion mediated text
prop_text <- paste0(
  "Prop. Mediated = ", format(round(results$n.avg * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  "95% CI: ", format(round(results$n.avg.ci[1] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "% to ",
  format(round(results$n.avg.ci[2] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  ifelse(results$n.avg.p < 0.001,
         "P < 0.001",
         paste0("P = ", format(round(results$n.avg.p, 3), nsmall = 3)))
)

# Axis range
x_min <- min(plot_df$Lower, na.rm = TRUE)
x_max <- max(plot_df$Upper, na.rm = TRUE)
x_pad <- 0.35 * (x_max - x_min)

# Plot
HCMPF_CRP_ADHD<-ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Estimate, y = Effect)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey65", linewidth = 0.7) +
  
  geom_errorbarh(
    aes(xmin = Lower, xmax = Upper),
    height = 0.16,
    linewidth = 1,
    color = "grey40"
  ) +
  
  geom_point(
    size = 4,
    shape = 21,
    fill = "#B3C5F1",
    color = "#B3C5F1",
    stroke = 0.4
  ) +
  
  geom_text(
    aes(x = Upper, label = p_label),
    hjust = -0.15,
    size = 4.2
  ) +
  
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_min + 0.02 * (x_max - x_min),
    y = 1.05,
    label = prop_text,
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 1,
    size = 4
  ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(x_min, x_max + x_pad),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.02))
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Mediation analysis",
    subtitle = "Exposure: Hydroxy-CMPF   Mediator: CRP   Outcome: ADHD",
    x = "Effect sizes",
    y = NULL
    #caption = "ACME: average causal mediation effect; ADE: average direct effect."
  ) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 17, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 13),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey30"),
    plot.margin = margin(20, 90, 20, 20)
  ) +
  
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")
HCMPF_CRP_ADHD
```
CRP 3-CMPFP
```{r}
model.M <- lm(CRP ~ 3cmpfp, na.action = na.omit,PM)
summary(model.M)

model.Y <- glm(adhd~3cmpfp + CRP, family=binomial, na.action = na.omit,PM)
summary(model.Y)

set.seed(234)
results <- mediation::mediate(
  model.m = model.M,
  model.y = model.Y,
  treat = "3cmpfp",
  mediator = "CRP",
  boot = TRUE,
  sims = 1000
)
summary(results)
plot(results)
prop_mediated <- results$n.avg * 100  # Convert to percentage
mediation_p_value <- results$n.avg.p
ACME_P_value <- results$d.avg.p  # Ass

plot_df <- data.frame(
  Effect = factor(c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect"),
                  levels = c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect")),
  Estimate = c(results$d.avg, results$z.avg, results$tau.coef),
  Lower = c(results$d.avg.ci[1], results$z.avg.ci[1], results$tau.ci[1]),
  Upper = c(results$d.avg.ci[2], results$z.avg.ci[2], results$tau.ci[2]),
  P_value = c(results$d.avg.p, results$z.avg.p, results$tau.p)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = ifelse(P_value < 0.001, "P < 0.001",
                     paste0("P = ", format(round(P_value, 3), nsmall = 3)))
  )

prop_label <- paste0(
  "Prop. Mediated (avg) = ",
  round(results$n.avg * 100, 2), "%  ",
  "(",
  round(results$n.avg.ci[1] * 100, 2), "%, ",
  round(results$n.avg.ci[2] * 100, 2), "%)",
  "; P = ",
  ifelse(results$n.avg.p < 0.001, "< 0.001",
         format(round(results$n.avg.p, 3), nsmall = 3))
)

# Data for main effects
plot_df <- data.frame(
  Effect = factor(c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect"),
                  levels = c("Total Effect", "ADE", "ACME")),
  Estimate = c(results$tau.coef, results$z.avg, results$d.avg),
  Lower = c(results$tau.ci[1], results$z.avg.ci[1], results$d.avg.ci[1]),
  Upper = c(results$tau.ci[2], results$z.avg.ci[2], results$d.avg.ci[2]),
  P_value = c(results$tau.p, results$z.avg.p, results$d.avg.p)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = case_when(
      P_value < 0.001 ~ "P < 0.001",
      TRUE ~ paste0("P = ", format(round(P_value, 3), nsmall = 3))
    )
  )

# Text for mediation proportion
prop_text <- paste0(
  "Prop. Mediated = ", format(round(results$n.avg * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  "95% CI: ", format(round(results$n.avg.ci[1] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "% to ",
  format(round(results$n.avg.ci[2] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  ifelse(results$n.avg.p < 0.001, "P < 0.001",
         paste0("P = ", format(round(results$n.avg.p, 3), nsmall = 3)))
)

# Expand x-range a bit so labels fit nicely
x_min <- min(plot_df$Lower, na.rm = TRUE)
x_max <- max(plot_df$Upper, na.rm = TRUE)
x_pad <- 0.35 * (x_max - x_min)

# Prepare data
plot_df <- data.frame(
  Effect = factor(c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect"),
                  levels = c("Total Effect", "ADE", "ACME")),
  Estimate = c(results$tau.coef, results$z.avg, results$d.avg),
  Lower = c(results$tau.ci[1], results$z.avg.ci[1], results$d.avg.ci[1]),
  Upper = c(results$tau.ci[2], results$z.avg.ci[2], results$d.avg.ci[2]),
  P_value = c(results$tau.p, results$z.avg.p, results$d.avg.p)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = case_when(
      P_value < 0.001 ~ "P < 0.001",
      TRUE ~ paste0("P = ", format(round(P_value, 3), nsmall = 3))
    )
  )

# Proportion mediated text
prop_text <- paste0(
  "Prop. Mediated = ", format(round(results$n.avg * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  "95% CI: ", format(round(results$n.avg.ci[1] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "% to ",
  format(round(results$n.avg.ci[2] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  ifelse(results$n.avg.p < 0.001,
         "P < 0.001",
         paste0("P = ", format(round(results$n.avg.p, 3), nsmall = 3)))
)

# Axis range
x_min <- min(plot_df$Lower, na.rm = TRUE)
x_max <- max(plot_df$Upper, na.rm = TRUE)
x_pad <- 0.35 * (x_max - x_min)

# Plot
CMPFP3_CRP_ADHD<-ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Estimate, y = Effect)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey65", linewidth = 0.7) +
  
  geom_errorbarh(
    aes(xmin = Lower, xmax = Upper),
    height = 0.16,
    linewidth = 1,
    color = "grey40"
  ) +
  
  geom_point(
    size = 4,
    shape = 21,
    fill = "#B3C5F1",
    color = "#B3C5F1",
    stroke = 0.4
  ) +
  
  geom_text(
    aes(x = Upper, label = p_label),
    hjust = -0.15,
    size = 4.2
  ) +
  
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_min + 0.02 * (x_max - x_min),
    y = 1.05,
    label = prop_text,
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 1,
    size = 4
  ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(x_min, x_max + x_pad),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.02))
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Mediation analysis",
    subtitle = "Exposure:3-CMPFP   Mediator: CRP   Outcome: ADHD",
    x = "Effect sizes",
    y = NULL
   # caption = "ACME: average causal mediation effect; ADE: average direct effect."
  ) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 17, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 13),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey30"),
    plot.margin = margin(20, 90, 20, 20)
  ) +
  
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")
CMPFP3_CRP_ADHD
```


CRP CMPF
```{r}
model.M <- lm(CRP ~ cmpf, na.action = na.omit,PM)
summary(model.M)

model.Y <- glm(adhd~cmpf + CRP, family=binomial, na.action = na.omit,PM)
summary(model.Y)

set.seed(234)
results <- mediation::mediate(
  model.m = model.M,
  model.y = model.Y,
  treat = "cmpf",
  mediator = "CRP",
  boot = TRUE,
  sims = 1000
)
summary(results)
plot(results)
prop_mediated <- results$n.avg * 100  # Convert to percentage
mediation_p_value <- results$n.avg.p
ACME_P_value <- results$d.avg.p  # Ass

plot_df <- data.frame(
  Effect = factor(c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect"),
                  levels = c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect")),
  Estimate = c(results$d.avg, results$z.avg, results$tau.coef),
  Lower = c(results$d.avg.ci[1], results$z.avg.ci[1], results$tau.ci[1]),
  Upper = c(results$d.avg.ci[2], results$z.avg.ci[2], results$tau.ci[2]),
  P_value = c(results$d.avg.p, results$z.avg.p, results$tau.p)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = ifelse(P_value < 0.001, "P < 0.001",
                     paste0("P = ", format(round(P_value, 3), nsmall = 3)))
  )

prop_label <- paste0(
  "Prop. Mediated (avg) = ",
  round(results$n.avg * 100, 2), "%  ",
  "(",
  round(results$n.avg.ci[1] * 100, 2), "%, ",
  round(results$n.avg.ci[2] * 100, 2), "%)",
  "; P = ",
  ifelse(results$n.avg.p < 0.001, "< 0.001",
         format(round(results$n.avg.p, 3), nsmall = 3))
)

# Data for main effects
plot_df <- data.frame(
  Effect = factor(c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect"),
                  levels = c("Total Effect", "ADE", "ACME")),
  Estimate = c(results$tau.coef, results$z.avg, results$d.avg),
  Lower = c(results$tau.ci[1], results$z.avg.ci[1], results$d.avg.ci[1]),
  Upper = c(results$tau.ci[2], results$z.avg.ci[2], results$d.avg.ci[2]),
  P_value = c(results$tau.p, results$z.avg.p, results$d.avg.p)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = case_when(
      P_value < 0.001 ~ "P < 0.001",
      TRUE ~ paste0("P = ", format(round(P_value, 3), nsmall = 3))
    )
  )

# Text for mediation proportion
prop_text <- paste0(
  "Prop. Mediated = ", format(round(results$n.avg * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  "95% CI: ", format(round(results$n.avg.ci[1] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "% to ",
  format(round(results$n.avg.ci[2] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  ifelse(results$n.avg.p < 0.001, "P < 0.001",
         paste0("P = ", format(round(results$n.avg.p, 3), nsmall = 3)))
)

# Expand x-range a bit so labels fit nicely
x_min <- min(plot_df$Lower, na.rm = TRUE)
x_max <- max(plot_df$Upper, na.rm = TRUE)
x_pad <- 0.35 * (x_max - x_min)

# Prepare data
plot_df <- data.frame(
  Effect = factor(c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect"),
                  levels = c("Total Effect", "ADE", "ACME")),
  Estimate = c(results$tau.coef, results$z.avg, results$d.avg),
  Lower = c(results$tau.ci[1], results$z.avg.ci[1], results$d.avg.ci[1]),
  Upper = c(results$tau.ci[2], results$z.avg.ci[2], results$d.avg.ci[2]),
  P_value = c(results$tau.p, results$z.avg.p, results$d.avg.p)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = case_when(
      P_value < 0.001 ~ "P < 0.001",
      TRUE ~ paste0("P = ", format(round(P_value, 3), nsmall = 3))
    )
  )

# Proportion mediated text
prop_text <- paste0(
  "Prop. Mediated = ", format(round(results$n.avg * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  "95% CI: ", format(round(results$n.avg.ci[1] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "% to ",
  format(round(results$n.avg.ci[2] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  ifelse(results$n.avg.p < 0.001,
         "P < 0.001",
         paste0("P = ", format(round(results$n.avg.p, 3), nsmall = 3)))
)

# Axis range
x_min <- min(plot_df$Lower, na.rm = TRUE)
x_max <- max(plot_df$Upper, na.rm = TRUE)
x_pad <- 0.35 * (x_max - x_min)

# Plot
CMPF_CRP_ADHD<-ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Estimate, y = Effect)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey65", linewidth = 0.7) +
  
  geom_errorbarh(
    aes(xmin = Lower, xmax = Upper),
    height = 0.16,
    linewidth = 1,
    color = "grey40"
  ) +
  
  geom_point(
    size = 4,
    shape = 21,
    fill = "#B3C5F1",
    color = "#B3C5F1",
    stroke = 0.4
  ) +
  
  geom_text(
    aes(x = Upper, label = p_label),
    hjust = -0.15,
    size = 4.2
  ) +
  
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_min + 0.02 * (x_max - x_min),
    y = 1.05,
    label = prop_text,
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 1,
    size = 4
  ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(x_min, x_max + x_pad),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.02))
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Mediation analysis",
    subtitle = "Exposure:CMPF   Mediator: CRP   Outcome: ADHD",
    x = "Effect sizes",
    y = NULL
    #caption = "ACME: average causal mediation effect; ADE: average direct effect."
  ) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 17, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 13),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey30"),
    plot.margin = margin(20, 90, 20, 20)
  ) +
  
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")
CMPF_CRP_ADHD
```

CMPF IL6 
```{r}
model.M <- lm(IL6 ~ cmpf, na.action = na.omit,PM)
summary(model.M)

model.Y <- glm(adhd~cmpf + IL6, family=binomial, na.action = na.omit,PM)
summary(model.Y)

set.seed(234)
results <- mediation::mediate(
  model.m = model.M,
  model.y = model.Y,
  treat = "cmpf",
  mediator = "IL6",
  boot = TRUE,
  sims = 1000
)
summary(results)
plot(results)
prop_mediated <- results$n.avg * 100  # Convert to percentage
mediation_p_value <- results$n.avg.p
ACME_P_value <- results$d.avg.p  # Ass

plot_df <- data.frame(
  Effect = factor(c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect"),
                  levels = c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect")),
  Estimate = c(results$d.avg, results$z.avg, results$tau.coef),
  Lower = c(results$d.avg.ci[1], results$z.avg.ci[1], results$tau.ci[1]),
  Upper = c(results$d.avg.ci[2], results$z.avg.ci[2], results$tau.ci[2]),
  P_value = c(results$d.avg.p, results$z.avg.p, results$tau.p)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = ifelse(P_value < 0.001, "P < 0.001",
                     paste0("P = ", format(round(P_value, 3), nsmall = 3)))
  )

prop_label <- paste0(
  "Prop. Mediated (avg) = ",
  round(results$n.avg * 100, 2), "%  ",
  "(",
  round(results$n.avg.ci[1] * 100, 2), "%, ",
  round(results$n.avg.ci[2] * 100, 2), "%)",
  "; P = ",
  ifelse(results$n.avg.p < 0.001, "< 0.001",
         format(round(results$n.avg.p, 3), nsmall = 3))
)

# Data for main effects
plot_df <- data.frame(
  Effect = factor(c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect"),
                  levels = c("Total Effect", "ADE", "ACME")),
  Estimate = c(results$tau.coef, results$z.avg, results$d.avg),
  Lower = c(results$tau.ci[1], results$z.avg.ci[1], results$d.avg.ci[1]),
  Upper = c(results$tau.ci[2], results$z.avg.ci[2], results$d.avg.ci[2]),
  P_value = c(results$tau.p, results$z.avg.p, results$d.avg.p)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = case_when(
      P_value < 0.001 ~ "P < 0.001",
      TRUE ~ paste0("P = ", format(round(P_value, 3), nsmall = 3))
    )
  )

# Text for mediation proportion
prop_text <- paste0(
  "Prop. Mediated = ", format(round(results$n.avg * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  "95% CI: ", format(round(results$n.avg.ci[1] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "% to ",
  format(round(results$n.avg.ci[2] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  ifelse(results$n.avg.p < 0.001, "P < 0.001",
         paste0("P = ", format(round(results$n.avg.p, 3), nsmall = 3)))
)

# Expand x-range a bit so labels fit nicely
x_min <- min(plot_df$Lower, na.rm = TRUE)
x_max <- max(plot_df$Upper, na.rm = TRUE)
x_pad <- 0.35 * (x_max - x_min)

# Prepare data
plot_df <- data.frame(
  Effect = factor(c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect"),
                  levels = c("Total Effect", "ADE", "ACME")),
  Estimate = c(results$tau.coef, results$z.avg, results$d.avg),
  Lower = c(results$tau.ci[1], results$z.avg.ci[1], results$d.avg.ci[1]),
  Upper = c(results$tau.ci[2], results$z.avg.ci[2], results$d.avg.ci[2]),
  P_value = c(results$tau.p, results$z.avg.p, results$d.avg.p)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = case_when(
      P_value < 0.001 ~ "P < 0.001",
      TRUE ~ paste0("P = ", format(round(P_value, 3), nsmall = 3))
    )
  )

# Proportion mediated text
prop_text <- paste0(
  "Prop. Mediated = ", format(round(results$n.avg * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  "95% CI: ", format(round(results$n.avg.ci[1] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "% to ",
  format(round(results$n.avg.ci[2] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  ifelse(results$n.avg.p < 0.001,
         "P < 0.001",
         paste0("P = ", format(round(results$n.avg.p, 3), nsmall = 3)))
)

# Axis range
x_min <- min(plot_df$Lower, na.rm = TRUE)
x_max <- max(plot_df$Upper, na.rm = TRUE)
x_pad <- 0.35 * (x_max - x_min)

# Plot
IL6_CMPF_ADHD<-ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Estimate, y = Effect)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey65", linewidth = 0.7) +
  
  geom_errorbarh(
    aes(xmin = Lower, xmax = Upper),
    height = 0.16,
    linewidth = 1,
    color = "grey40"
  ) +
  
  geom_point(
    size = 4,
    shape = 21,
    fill = "#B3C5F1",
    color = "#B3C5F1",
    stroke = 0.4
  ) +
  
  geom_text(
    aes(x = Upper, label = p_label),
    hjust = -0.15,
    size = 4.2
  ) +
  
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_min + 0.02 * (x_max - x_min),
    y = 1.05,
    label = prop_text,
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 1,
    size = 4
  ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(x_min, x_max + x_pad),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.02))
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Mediation analysis",
    subtitle = "Exposure:CMPF   Mediator: IL6   Outcome: ADHD",
    x = "Effect sizes",
    y = NULL
  #  caption = "ACME: average causal mediation effect; ADE: average direct effect."
  ) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 17, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 13),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey30"),
    plot.margin = margin(20, 90, 20, 20)
  ) +
  
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")
IL6_CMPF_ADHD
```
IL6 HCMPF
```{r}
model.M <- lm(IL6 ~ hcmpf, na.action = na.omit,PM)
summary(model.M)

model.Y <- glm(adhd~hcmpf + IL6, family=binomial, na.action = na.omit,PM)
summary(model.Y)

set.seed(234)
results <- mediation::mediate(
  model.m = model.M,
  model.y = model.Y,
  treat = "hcmpf",
  mediator = "IL6",
  boot = TRUE,
  sims = 1000
)
summary(results)
plot(results)
prop_mediated <- results$n.avg * 100  # Convert to percentage
mediation_p_value <- results$n.avg.p
ACME_P_value <- results$d.avg.p  # Ass

plot_df <- data.frame(
  Effect = factor(c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect"),
                  levels = c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect")),
  Estimate = c(results$d.avg, results$z.avg, results$tau.coef),
  Lower = c(results$d.avg.ci[1], results$z.avg.ci[1], results$tau.ci[1]),
  Upper = c(results$d.avg.ci[2], results$z.avg.ci[2], results$tau.ci[2]),
  P_value = c(results$d.avg.p, results$z.avg.p, results$tau.p)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = ifelse(P_value < 0.001, "P < 0.001",
                     paste0("P = ", format(round(P_value, 3), nsmall = 3)))
  )

prop_label <- paste0(
  "Prop. Mediated (avg) = ",
  round(results$n.avg * 100, 2), "%  ",
  "(",
  round(results$n.avg.ci[1] * 100, 2), "%, ",
  round(results$n.avg.ci[2] * 100, 2), "%)",
  "; P = ",
  ifelse(results$n.avg.p < 0.001, "< 0.001",
         format(round(results$n.avg.p, 3), nsmall = 3))
)

# Data for main effects
plot_df <- data.frame(
  Effect = factor(c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect"),
                  levels = c("Total Effect", "ADE", "ACME")),
  Estimate = c(results$tau.coef, results$z.avg, results$d.avg),
  Lower = c(results$tau.ci[1], results$z.avg.ci[1], results$d.avg.ci[1]),
  Upper = c(results$tau.ci[2], results$z.avg.ci[2], results$d.avg.ci[2]),
  P_value = c(results$tau.p, results$z.avg.p, results$d.avg.p)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = case_when(
      P_value < 0.001 ~ "P < 0.001",
      TRUE ~ paste0("P = ", format(round(P_value, 3), nsmall = 3))
    )
  )

# Text for mediation proportion
prop_text <- paste0(
  "Prop. Mediated = ", format(round(results$n.avg * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  "95% CI: ", format(round(results$n.avg.ci[1] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "% to ",
  format(round(results$n.avg.ci[2] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  ifelse(results$n.avg.p < 0.001, "P < 0.001",
         paste0("P = ", format(round(results$n.avg.p, 3), nsmall = 3)))
)

# Expand x-range a bit so labels fit nicely
x_min <- min(plot_df$Lower, na.rm = TRUE)
x_max <- max(plot_df$Upper, na.rm = TRUE)
x_pad <- 0.35 * (x_max - x_min)

# Prepare data
plot_df <- data.frame(
  Effect = factor(c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect"),
                  levels = c("Total Effect", "ADE", "ACME")),
  Estimate = c(results$tau.coef, results$z.avg, results$d.avg),
  Lower = c(results$tau.ci[1], results$z.avg.ci[1], results$d.avg.ci[1]),
  Upper = c(results$tau.ci[2], results$z.avg.ci[2], results$d.avg.ci[2]),
  P_value = c(results$tau.p, results$z.avg.p, results$d.avg.p)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = case_when(
      P_value < 0.001 ~ "P < 0.001",
      TRUE ~ paste0("P = ", format(round(P_value, 3), nsmall = 3))
    )
  )

# Proportion mediated text
prop_text <- paste0(
  "Prop. Mediated = ", format(round(results$n.avg * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  "95% CI: ", format(round(results$n.avg.ci[1] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "% to ",
  format(round(results$n.avg.ci[2] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  ifelse(results$n.avg.p < 0.001,
         "P < 0.001",
         paste0("P = ", format(round(results$n.avg.p, 3), nsmall = 3)))
)

# Axis range
x_min <- min(plot_df$Lower, na.rm = TRUE)
x_max <- max(plot_df$Upper, na.rm = TRUE)
x_pad <- 0.35 * (x_max - x_min)

# Plot
IL6_HCMPF_ADHD<-ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Estimate, y = Effect)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey65", linewidth = 0.7) +
  
  geom_errorbarh(
    aes(xmin = Lower, xmax = Upper),
    height = 0.16,
    linewidth = 1,
    color = "grey40"
  ) +
  
  geom_point(
    size = 4,
    shape = 21,
    fill = "#B3C5F1",
    color = "#B3C5F1",
    stroke = 0.4
  ) +
  
  geom_text(
    aes(x = Upper, label = p_label),
    hjust = -0.15,
    size = 4.2
  ) +
  
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_min + 0.02 * (x_max - x_min),
    y = 1.05,
    label = prop_text,
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 1,
    size = 4
  ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(x_min, x_max + x_pad),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.02))
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Mediation analysis",
    subtitle = "Exposure:Hydorxy-CMPF   Mediator: IL6   Outcome: ADHD",
    x = "Effect sizes",
    y = NULL
    #caption = "ACME: average causal mediation effect; ADE: average direct effect."
  ) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 17, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 13),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey30"),
    plot.margin = margin(20, 90, 20, 20)
  ) +
  
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")
IL6_HCMPF_ADHD
```
IL6-3CMPFP
```{r}
model.M <- lm(IL6 ~ 3cmpfp, na.action = na.omit,PM)
summary(model.M)

model.Y <- glm(adhd~3cmpfp  + IL6, family=binomial, na.action = na.omit,PM)
summary(model.Y)

set.seed(234)
results <- mediation::mediate(
  model.m = model.M,
  model.y = model.Y,
  treat = "3cmpfp",
  mediator = "IL6",
  boot = TRUE,
  sims = 1000
)
summary(results)
plot(results)
prop_mediated <- results$n.avg * 100  # Convert to percentage
mediation_p_value <- results$n.avg.p
ACME_P_value <- results$d.avg.p  # Ass

plot_df <- data.frame(
  Effect = factor(c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect"),
                  levels = c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect")),
  Estimate = c(results$d.avg, results$z.avg, results$tau.coef),
  Lower = c(results$d.avg.ci[1], results$z.avg.ci[1], results$tau.ci[1]),
  Upper = c(results$d.avg.ci[2], results$z.avg.ci[2], results$tau.ci[2]),
  P_value = c(results$d.avg.p, results$z.avg.p, results$tau.p)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = ifelse(P_value < 0.001, "P < 0.001",
                     paste0("P = ", format(round(P_value, 3), nsmall = 3)))
  )

prop_label <- paste0(
  "Prop. Mediated (avg) = ",
  round(results$n.avg * 100, 2), "%  ",
  "(",
  round(results$n.avg.ci[1] * 100, 2), "%, ",
  round(results$n.avg.ci[2] * 100, 2), "%)",
  "; P = ",
  ifelse(results$n.avg.p < 0.001, "< 0.001",
         format(round(results$n.avg.p, 3), nsmall = 3))
)

# Data for main effects
plot_df <- data.frame(
  Effect = factor(c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect"),
                  levels = c("Total Effect", "ADE", "ACME")),
  Estimate = c(results$tau.coef, results$z.avg, results$d.avg),
  Lower = c(results$tau.ci[1], results$z.avg.ci[1], results$d.avg.ci[1]),
  Upper = c(results$tau.ci[2], results$z.avg.ci[2], results$d.avg.ci[2]),
  P_value = c(results$tau.p, results$z.avg.p, results$d.avg.p)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = case_when(
      P_value < 0.001 ~ "P < 0.001",
      TRUE ~ paste0("P = ", format(round(P_value, 3), nsmall = 3))
    )
  )

# Text for mediation proportion
prop_text <- paste0(
  "Prop. Mediated = ", format(round(results$n.avg * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  "95% CI: ", format(round(results$n.avg.ci[1] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "% to ",
  format(round(results$n.avg.ci[2] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  ifelse(results$n.avg.p < 0.001, "P < 0.001",
         paste0("P = ", format(round(results$n.avg.p, 3), nsmall = 3)))
)

# Expand x-range a bit so labels fit nicely
x_min <- min(plot_df$Lower, na.rm = TRUE)
x_max <- max(plot_df$Upper, na.rm = TRUE)
x_pad <- 0.35 * (x_max - x_min)

# Prepare data
plot_df <- data.frame(
  Effect = factor(c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect"),
                  levels = c("Total Effect", "ADE", "ACME")),
  Estimate = c(results$tau.coef, results$z.avg, results$d.avg),
  Lower = c(results$tau.ci[1], results$z.avg.ci[1], results$d.avg.ci[1]),
  Upper = c(results$tau.ci[2], results$z.avg.ci[2], results$d.avg.ci[2]),
  P_value = c(results$tau.p, results$z.avg.p, results$d.avg.p)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = case_when(
      P_value < 0.001 ~ "P < 0.001",
      TRUE ~ paste0("P = ", format(round(P_value, 3), nsmall = 3))
    )
  )

# Proportion mediated text
prop_text <- paste0(
  "Prop. Mediated = ", format(round(results$n.avg * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  "95% CI: ", format(round(results$n.avg.ci[1] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "% to ",
  format(round(results$n.avg.ci[2] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  ifelse(results$n.avg.p < 0.001,
         "P < 0.001",
         paste0("P = ", format(round(results$n.avg.p, 3), nsmall = 3)))
)

# Axis range
x_min <- min(plot_df$Lower, na.rm = TRUE)
x_max <- max(plot_df$Upper, na.rm = TRUE)
x_pad <- 0.35 * (x_max - x_min)

# Plot
IL6_3CMPFP_ADHD<-ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Estimate, y = Effect)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey65", linewidth = 0.7) +
  
  geom_errorbarh(
    aes(xmin = Lower, xmax = Upper),
    height = 0.16,
    linewidth = 1,
    color = "grey40"
  ) +
  
  geom_point(
    size = 4,
    shape = 21,
    fill = "#B3C5F1",
    color = "#B3C5F1",
    stroke = 0.4
  ) +
  
  geom_text(
    aes(x = Upper, label = p_label),
    hjust = -0.15,
    size = 4.2
  ) +
  
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_min + 0.02 * (x_max - x_min),
    y = 1.05,
    label = prop_text,
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 1,
    size = 4
  ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(x_min, x_max + x_pad),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.02))
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Mediation analysis",
    subtitle = "Exposure:3-CMPFP   Mediator: IL6   Outcome: ADHD",
    x = "Effect sizes",
    y = NULL
   # caption = "ACME: average causal mediation effect; ADE: average direct effect."
  ) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 17, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 13),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey30"),
    plot.margin = margin(20, 90, 20, 20)
  ) +
  
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")
IL6_3CMPFP_ADHD
```

IL12 HCMPF
```{r}
model.M <- lm(IL_12B ~ hcmpf, na.action = na.omit,PM)
summary(model.M)

model.Y <- glm(adhd~hcmpf + IL_12B, family=binomial, na.action = na.omit,PM)
summary(model.Y)

set.seed(234)
results <- mediation::mediate(
  model.m = model.M,
  model.y = model.Y,
  treat = "hcmpf",
  mediator = "IL_12B",
  boot = TRUE,
  sims = 1000
)
summary(results)
plot(results)
prop_mediated <- results$n.avg * 100  # Convert to percentage
mediation_p_value <- results$n.avg.p
ACME_P_value <- results$d.avg.p  # Ass

plot_df <- data.frame(
  Effect = factor(c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect"),
                  levels = c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect")),
  Estimate = c(results$d.avg, results$z.avg, results$tau.coef),
  Lower = c(results$d.avg.ci[1], results$z.avg.ci[1], results$tau.ci[1]),
  Upper = c(results$d.avg.ci[2], results$z.avg.ci[2], results$tau.ci[2]),
  P_value = c(results$d.avg.p, results$z.avg.p, results$tau.p)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = ifelse(P_value < 0.001, "P < 0.001",
                     paste0("P = ", format(round(P_value, 3), nsmall = 3)))
  )

prop_label <- paste0(
  "Prop. Mediated (avg) = ",
  round(results$n.avg * 100, 2), "%  ",
  "(",
  round(results$n.avg.ci[1] * 100, 2), "%, ",
  round(results$n.avg.ci[2] * 100, 2), "%)",
  "; P = ",
  ifelse(results$n.avg.p < 0.001, "< 0.001",
         format(round(results$n.avg.p, 3), nsmall = 3))
)

# Data for main effects
plot_df <- data.frame(
  Effect = factor(c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect"),
                  levels = c("Total Effect", "ADE", "ACME")),
  Estimate = c(results$tau.coef, results$z.avg, results$d.avg),
  Lower = c(results$tau.ci[1], results$z.avg.ci[1], results$d.avg.ci[1]),
  Upper = c(results$tau.ci[2], results$z.avg.ci[2], results$d.avg.ci[2]),
  P_value = c(results$tau.p, results$z.avg.p, results$d.avg.p)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = case_when(
      P_value < 0.001 ~ "P < 0.001",
      TRUE ~ paste0("P = ", format(round(P_value, 3), nsmall = 3))
    )
  )

# Text for mediation proportion
prop_text <- paste0(
  "Prop. Mediated = ", format(round(results$n.avg * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  "95% CI: ", format(round(results$n.avg.ci[1] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "% to ",
  format(round(results$n.avg.ci[2] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  ifelse(results$n.avg.p < 0.001, "P < 0.001",
         paste0("P = ", format(round(results$n.avg.p, 3), nsmall = 3)))
)

# Expand x-range a bit so labels fit nicely
x_min <- min(plot_df$Lower, na.rm = TRUE)
x_max <- max(plot_df$Upper, na.rm = TRUE)
x_pad <- 0.35 * (x_max - x_min)

# Prepare data
plot_df <- data.frame(
  Effect = factor(c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect"),
                  levels = c("Total Effect", "ADE", "ACME")),
  Estimate = c(results$tau.coef, results$z.avg, results$d.avg),
  Lower = c(results$tau.ci[1], results$z.avg.ci[1], results$d.avg.ci[1]),
  Upper = c(results$tau.ci[2], results$z.avg.ci[2], results$d.avg.ci[2]),
  P_value = c(results$tau.p, results$z.avg.p, results$d.avg.p)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = case_when(
      P_value < 0.001 ~ "P < 0.001",
      TRUE ~ paste0("P = ", format(round(P_value, 3), nsmall = 3))
    )
  )

# Proportion mediated text
prop_text <- paste0(
  "Prop. Mediated = ", format(round(results$n.avg * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  "95% CI: ", format(round(results$n.avg.ci[1] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "% to ",
  format(round(results$n.avg.ci[2] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  ifelse(results$n.avg.p < 0.001,
         "P < 0.001",
         paste0("P = ", format(round(results$n.avg.p, 3), nsmall = 3)))
)

# Axis range
x_min <- min(plot_df$Lower, na.rm = TRUE)
x_max <- max(plot_df$Upper, na.rm = TRUE)
x_pad <- 0.35 * (x_max - x_min)

# Plot
IL12B_HCMPF_ADHD<-ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Estimate, y = Effect)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey65", linewidth = 0.7) +
  
  geom_errorbarh(
    aes(xmin = Lower, xmax = Upper),
    height = 0.16,
    linewidth = 1,
    color = "grey40"
  ) +
  
  geom_point(
    size = 4,
    shape = 21,
    fill = "#B3C5F1",
    color = "#B3C5F1",
    stroke = 0.4
  ) +
  
  geom_text(
    aes(x = Upper, label = p_label),
    hjust = -0.15,
    size = 4.2
  ) +
  
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_min + 0.02 * (x_max - x_min),
    y = 1.05,
    label = prop_text,
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 1,
    size = 4
  ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(x_min, x_max + x_pad),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.02))
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Mediation analysis",
    subtitle = "Exposure:Hydorxy-CMPF   Mediator: IL-12B   Outcome: ADHD",
    x = "Effect sizes",
    y = NULL
    #caption = "ACME: average causal mediation effect; ADE: average direct effect."
  ) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 17, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 13),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey30"),
    plot.margin = margin(20, 90, 20, 20)
  ) +
  
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")
IL12B_HCMPF_ADHD
```
IL12B-3CMPFP
```{r}
model.M <- lm(IL_12B ~ 3cmpfp, na.action = na.omit,PM)
summary(model.M)

model.Y <- glm(adhd~3cmpfp  + IL_12B, family=binomial, na.action = na.omit,PM)
summary(model.Y)

set.seed(234)
results <- mediation::mediate(
  model.m = model.M,
  model.y = model.Y,
  treat = "3cmpfp",
  mediator = "IL_12B",
  boot = TRUE,
  sims = 1000
)
summary(results)
plot(results)
prop_mediated <- results$n.avg * 100  # Convert to percentage
mediation_p_value <- results$n.avg.p
ACME_P_value <- results$d.avg.p  # Ass

plot_df <- data.frame(
  Effect = factor(c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect"),
                  levels = c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect")),
  Estimate = c(results$d.avg, results$z.avg, results$tau.coef),
  Lower = c(results$d.avg.ci[1], results$z.avg.ci[1], results$tau.ci[1]),
  Upper = c(results$d.avg.ci[2], results$z.avg.ci[2], results$tau.ci[2]),
  P_value = c(results$d.avg.p, results$z.avg.p, results$tau.p)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = ifelse(P_value < 0.001, "P < 0.001",
                     paste0("P = ", format(round(P_value, 3), nsmall = 3)))
  )

prop_label <- paste0(
  "Prop. Mediated (avg) = ",
  round(results$n.avg * 100, 2), "%  ",
  "(",
  round(results$n.avg.ci[1] * 100, 2), "%, ",
  round(results$n.avg.ci[2] * 100, 2), "%)",
  "; P = ",
  ifelse(results$n.avg.p < 0.001, "< 0.001",
         format(round(results$n.avg.p, 3), nsmall = 3))
)

# Data for main effects
plot_df <- data.frame(
  Effect = factor(c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect"),
                  levels = c("Total Effect", "ADE", "ACME")),
  Estimate = c(results$tau.coef, results$z.avg, results$d.avg),
  Lower = c(results$tau.ci[1], results$z.avg.ci[1], results$d.avg.ci[1]),
  Upper = c(results$tau.ci[2], results$z.avg.ci[2], results$d.avg.ci[2]),
  P_value = c(results$tau.p, results$z.avg.p, results$d.avg.p)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = case_when(
      P_value < 0.001 ~ "P < 0.001",
      TRUE ~ paste0("P = ", format(round(P_value, 3), nsmall = 3))
    )
  )

# Text for mediation proportion
prop_text <- paste0(
  "Prop. Mediated = ", format(round(results$n.avg * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  "95% CI: ", format(round(results$n.avg.ci[1] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "% to ",
  format(round(results$n.avg.ci[2] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  ifelse(results$n.avg.p < 0.001, "P < 0.001",
         paste0("P = ", format(round(results$n.avg.p, 3), nsmall = 3)))
)

# Expand x-range a bit so labels fit nicely
x_min <- min(plot_df$Lower, na.rm = TRUE)
x_max <- max(plot_df$Upper, na.rm = TRUE)
x_pad <- 0.35 * (x_max - x_min)

# Prepare data
plot_df <- data.frame(
  Effect = factor(c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect"),
                  levels = c("Total Effect", "ADE", "ACME")),
  Estimate = c(results$tau.coef, results$z.avg, results$d.avg),
  Lower = c(results$tau.ci[1], results$z.avg.ci[1], results$d.avg.ci[1]),
  Upper = c(results$tau.ci[2], results$z.avg.ci[2], results$d.avg.ci[2]),
  P_value = c(results$tau.p, results$z.avg.p, results$d.avg.p)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = case_when(
      P_value < 0.001 ~ "P < 0.001",
      TRUE ~ paste0("P = ", format(round(P_value, 3), nsmall = 3))
    )
  )

# Proportion mediated text
prop_text <- paste0(
  "Prop. Mediated = ", format(round(results$n.avg * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  "95% CI: ", format(round(results$n.avg.ci[1] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "% to ",
  format(round(results$n.avg.ci[2] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  ifelse(results$n.avg.p < 0.001,
         "P < 0.001",
         paste0("P = ", format(round(results$n.avg.p, 3), nsmall = 3)))
)

# Axis range
x_min <- min(plot_df$Lower, na.rm = TRUE)
x_max <- max(plot_df$Upper, na.rm = TRUE)
x_pad <- 0.35 * (x_max - x_min)

# Plot
IL12B_3CMPFP_ADHD<-ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Estimate, y = Effect)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey65", linewidth = 0.7) +
  
  geom_errorbarh(
    aes(xmin = Lower, xmax = Upper),
    height = 0.16,
    linewidth = 1,
    color = "grey40"
  ) +
  
  geom_point(
    size = 4,
    shape = 21,
    fill = "#B3C5F1",
    color = "#B3C5F1",
    stroke = 0.4
  ) +
  
  geom_text(
    aes(x = Upper, label = p_label),
    hjust = -0.15,
    size = 4.2
  ) +
  
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_min + 0.02 * (x_max - x_min),
    y = 1.05,
    label = prop_text,
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 1,
    size = 4
  ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(x_min, x_max + x_pad),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.02))
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Mediation analysis",
    subtitle = "Exposure:3-CMPFP   Mediator: IL-12B   Outcome: ADHD",
    x = "Effect sizes",
    y = NULL
    #caption = "ACME: average causal mediation effect; ADE: average direct effect."
  ) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 17, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 13),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey30"),
    plot.margin = margin(20, 90, 20, 20)
  ) +
  
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")
IL12B_3CMPFP_ADHD
```
CMPF IL12B
```{r}
model.M <- lm(IL_12B ~ cmpf, na.action = na.omit,PM)
summary(model.M)

model.Y <- glm(adhd~cmpf  + IL_12B, family=binomial, na.action = na.omit,PM)
summary(model.Y)

set.seed(234)
results <- mediation::mediate(
  model.m = model.M,
  model.y = model.Y,
  treat = "cmpf",
  mediator = "IL_12B",
  boot = TRUE,
  sims = 1000
)
summary(results)
plot(results)
prop_mediated <- results$n.avg * 100  # Convert to percentage
mediation_p_value <- results$n.avg.p
ACME_P_value <- results$d.avg.p  # Ass

plot_df <- data.frame(
  Effect = factor(c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect"),
                  levels = c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect")),
  Estimate = c(results$d.avg, results$z.avg, results$tau.coef),
  Lower = c(results$d.avg.ci[1], results$z.avg.ci[1], results$tau.ci[1]),
  Upper = c(results$d.avg.ci[2], results$z.avg.ci[2], results$tau.ci[2]),
  P_value = c(results$d.avg.p, results$z.avg.p, results$tau.p)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = ifelse(P_value < 0.001, "P < 0.001",
                     paste0("P = ", format(round(P_value, 3), nsmall = 3)))
  )

prop_label <- paste0(
  "Prop. Mediated (avg) = ",
  round(results$n.avg * 100, 2), "%  ",
  "(",
  round(results$n.avg.ci[1] * 100, 2), "%, ",
  round(results$n.avg.ci[2] * 100, 2), "%)",
  "; P = ",
  ifelse(results$n.avg.p < 0.001, "< 0.001",
         format(round(results$n.avg.p, 3), nsmall = 3))
)

# Data for main effects
plot_df <- data.frame(
  Effect = factor(c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect"),
                  levels = c("Total Effect", "ADE", "ACME")),
  Estimate = c(results$tau.coef, results$z.avg, results$d.avg),
  Lower = c(results$tau.ci[1], results$z.avg.ci[1], results$d.avg.ci[1]),
  Upper = c(results$tau.ci[2], results$z.avg.ci[2], results$d.avg.ci[2]),
  P_value = c(results$tau.p, results$z.avg.p, results$d.avg.p)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = case_when(
      P_value < 0.001 ~ "P < 0.001",
      TRUE ~ paste0("P = ", format(round(P_value, 3), nsmall = 3))
    )
  )

# Text for mediation proportion
prop_text <- paste0(
  "Prop. Mediated = ", format(round(results$n.avg * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  "95% CI: ", format(round(results$n.avg.ci[1] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "% to ",
  format(round(results$n.avg.ci[2] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  ifelse(results$n.avg.p < 0.001, "P < 0.001",
         paste0("P = ", format(round(results$n.avg.p, 3), nsmall = 3)))
)

# Expand x-range a bit so labels fit nicely
x_min <- min(plot_df$Lower, na.rm = TRUE)
x_max <- max(plot_df$Upper, na.rm = TRUE)
x_pad <- 0.35 * (x_max - x_min)

# Prepare data
plot_df <- data.frame(
  Effect = factor(c("ACME", "ADE", "Total Effect"),
                  levels = c("Total Effect", "ADE", "ACME")),
  Estimate = c(results$tau.coef, results$z.avg, results$d.avg),
  Lower = c(results$tau.ci[1], results$z.avg.ci[1], results$d.avg.ci[1]),
  Upper = c(results$tau.ci[2], results$z.avg.ci[2], results$d.avg.ci[2]),
  P_value = c(results$tau.p, results$z.avg.p, results$d.avg.p)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = case_when(
      P_value < 0.001 ~ "P < 0.001",
      TRUE ~ paste0("P = ", format(round(P_value, 3), nsmall = 3))
    )
  )

# Proportion mediated text
prop_text <- paste0(
  "Prop. Mediated = ", format(round(results$n.avg * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  "95% CI: ", format(round(results$n.avg.ci[1] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "% to ",
  format(round(results$n.avg.ci[2] * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%\n",
  ifelse(results$n.avg.p < 0.001,
         "P < 0.001",
         paste0("P = ", format(round(results$n.avg.p, 3), nsmall = 3)))
)

# Axis range
x_min <- min(plot_df$Lower, na.rm = TRUE)
x_max <- max(plot_df$Upper, na.rm = TRUE)
x_pad <- 0.35 * (x_max - x_min)

# Plot
IL12B_CMPF_ADHD<-ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Estimate, y = Effect)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey65", linewidth = 0.7) +
  
  geom_errorbarh(
    aes(xmin = Lower, xmax = Upper),
    height = 0.16,
    linewidth = 1,
    color = "grey40"
  ) +
  
  geom_point(
    size = 4,
    shape = 21,
    fill = "#B3C5F1",
    color = "#B3C5F1",
    stroke = 0.4
  ) +
  
  geom_text(
    aes(x = Upper, label = p_label),
    hjust = -0.15,
    size = 4.2
  ) +
  
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_min + 0.02 * (x_max - x_min),
    y = 1.05,
    label = prop_text,
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 1,
    size = 4
  ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(x_min, x_max + x_pad),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.02))
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Mediation analysis",
    subtitle = "Exposure:CMPF   Mediator: IL-12B   Outcome: ADHD",
    x = "Effect sizes",
    y = NULL
    #caption = "ACME: average causal mediation effect; ADE: average direct effect."
  ) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 17, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 13),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey30"),
    plot.margin = margin(20, 90, 20, 20)
  ) +
  
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")
IL12B_CMPF_ADHD
```

```{r}
IL12B_CMPF_ADHD
IL12B_HCMPF_ADHD
IL12B_3CMPFP_ADHD
IL6_CMPF_ADHD
IL6_HCMPF_ADHD
IL6_3CMPFP_ADHD
CMPF_CRP_ADHD
HCMPF_CRP_ADHD
CMPFP3_CRP_ADHD

library(patchwork)
(plot_HCMPF|plot_CMPF|plot_3CMPF)
```
